title: LLM-generated docs remediation report front-matter
description: Shape of the YAML front-matter for a remediation report under docs/generated/design/_meta/remediations/. The body of the report (Summary, optional Escalated findings, Actions table) is not covered by this schema; it is enforced by the lint pass in regenerate.py.

remediation_report.description: Sentinel marking the file as a remediation report.

remediator_model.description: Identifier of the model that produced the remediation. The lower-cased value MUST start with 'claude' or 'anthropic'; the bookkeeping gate refuses other families.

target_doc.description: Manifest key of the remediated document (e.g. pipeline/05-ir-passes.md). Must match the target_doc of the linked review report.

review_report.description: Workspace-relative path to the review report being acted on (e.g. _meta/reviews/pipeline/05-ir-passes.md.review.md).

target_doc_source_commit_before.description: The source_commit in the target document's front-matter at the start of remediation (same as the linked review's target_doc_source_commit).

target_doc_source_commit_after.description: The source_commit in the target document's front-matter after remediation; equal to _before when no edits were made.

actions.description: The five counts must sum to the linked review report's finding_count; the lint pass enforces this.
